blocks.title: Round 1: Airports Round
blocks.description: Which major US airport is pictured here?

questions.prompt: Which major US airport is pictured here?
questions.masterNote: Expected answer: San Francisco International Airport. Accept SFO or San Francisco.

media.alt: Aerial photo of a major US airport

questions.prompt: Which major US airport is pictured here?
questions.masterNote: Expected answer: Daniel K. Inouye International Airport / Honolulu. Accept HNL or Honolulu.

media.alt: Aerial photo of a major US airport

questions.correctAnswer: Daniel K. Inouye International Airport / Honolulu (HNL)

questions.prompt: Which major US airport is pictured here?
questions.masterNote: Expected answer: Boston Logan International Airport. Accept BOS or Logan.

media.alt: Aerial photo of a major US airport

questions.prompt: Which major US airport is pictured here?
questions.masterNote: Expected answer: Chicago O'Hare International Airport. Accept ORD or O'Hare.

media.alt: Interior photo of a major US airport

questions.prompt: Which major US airport is pictured here?
questions.masterNote: Expected answer: Los Angeles International Airport. Accept LAX or Los Angeles.

media.alt: Photo of a major US airport control tower

questions.prompt: Which of these is NOT a German scientist?
Which element on Earth came entirely from ancient cosmic collisions, not from stellar fusion?
questions.masterNote: Expected answer: Gold. Heavy r-process elements are associated with neutron-star mergers and similar cosmic collisions.

questions.prompt: Which of these is a fictional German TV character known for being perpetually grumpy and depressed?
Which of these is NOT a prime number?
Order these by number of ski lifts, from fewest to most: Big Sky, Breckenridge, Arlberg, Les Trois Vallees, Garmisch-Partenkirchen.
questions.masterNote: Fewest to most: Garmisch-Partenkirchen, Breckenridge, Big Sky, Arlberg, Les Trois Vallees. Approx counts used: 18, 35, 40, 85, 159-161.
questions.correctAnswer: Garmisch-Partenkirchen → Breckenridge → Big Sky → Arlberg → Les Trois Vallees
acceptedAnswers: Garmisch-Partenkirchen, Breckenridge, Big Sky, Arlberg, Les Trois Vallees
Garmisch Partenkirchen, Breckenridge, Big Sky, Arlberg, Les Trois Vallees
Garmisch, Breckenridge, Big Sky, Arlberg, Les Trois Vallees

blocks.title: Round 5: Movie Round
blocks.description: Listen closely to this iconic scene and name the movie!

questions.prompt: Listen closely to this iconic scene and name the movie!
questions.masterNote: Devil Wears Prada — And if you don’t have the Harry Potter book by then, don’t even bother coming back!

questions.prompt: Listen closely to this iconic scene and name the movie!
